# Xee-mcp

> MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes two read-only tools for X (Twitter) to AI assistants: `search` and `user_tweets`. Uses cookie-based authentication via twikit — no paid X API, no per-request fees. Naming: X + See = Xee. Single-account, read-only, focused. MIT licensed, donation-only via paypal.me/aiyo28.

## What it does

`Xee-mcp` lets Claude, ChatGPT, or any MCP-compatible AI assistant search X posts and read user timelines without paying for the X API. It is a deliberately minimal alternative to mcp-twikit, official xmcp, and other Twitter/X MCP servers.

## Tools

- `search(query: str, limit: int = 20)` — Search X posts by keyword. Returns text, author, timestamp, URL, engagement.
- `user_tweets(handle: str, limit: int = 20)` — Read a user's recent posts. Same return shape as search.

## Auth

- twikit cookie file (single account). Path via `XEE_MCP_COOKIES` env var.
- No X API key. No OAuth. No rate-limit billing.
- Tradeoff: cookie auth is brittle. Bot-detection risk exists at higher volume.

## Install

```
git clone https://github.com/Aiyo28/Xee-mcp.git
cd Xee-mcp
uv sync
```

## Wire into Claude Desktop or Claude Code

Add to `claude_desktop_config.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "xee-mcp": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": ["run", "--directory", "/path/to/Xee-mcp", "xee-mcp"],
      "env": { "XEE_MCP_COOKIES": "/path/to/cookies.json" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Out of scope

- Posting to X. Different threat model — separate repo if ever built.
- DMs, likes, retweets, bookmarks. Read-only by name and by design.
- Multi-account pooling. Roadmapped via twscrape swap if cookie auth becomes unreliable.
- X API integration. Pay-per-use is the wrong shape for this tool's audience.

## Repo layout

- `src/xee_mcp/server.py` — MCP server entrypoint, tool registration
- `src/xee_mcp/client.py` — twikit wrapper, cookie loading
- `src/xee_mcp/tools.py` — `search` and `user_tweets` implementations
- `tests/` — pytest suite
- `README.md` — public-facing pitch
- `ROADMAP.md` — public scope evolution
- `CLAUDE.md` — agent session protocol for contributors using Claude Code

## Sibling project

[Yzel](https://github.com/Aiyo28/yzel) — MCP connectors for CIS business tools (1C, Bitrix24, AmoCRM, etc.). Same author, different scope (CIS business APIs, not global social).
